title: ReportBase
description: Base shape for any probabilistic report produced by an LLM-backed action (summarizers, `sm what`, `sm cluster-triggers`, etc.). All per-kind summary schemas under `summaries/` extend this. Kernel validates the `confidence` and `safety` fields regardless of action-specific extensions.

confidence.description: Model's self-assessed confidence in its own output, 0–1. Not calibrated across models; compare within the same action.

injectionDetected.description: True when the model flagged a prompt-injection attempt inside the node content. See `prompt-preamble.md` for the contract the model was primed with.

injectionDetails.description: Free-form notes from the model about the injection attempt.

contentQuality.description: `clean` = normal input. `suspicious` = unusual patterns without a concrete injection. `malformed` = unparseable or structurally broken.
